source_jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer, Product (Canada)
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT CENTARI

At Centari, we believe that in high-stakes dealmaking, the competitive edge lies within unlocking your firm's private deal data. Centari is building the deal intelligence platform for the future of law and finance, moving beyond simple automation and into a world of data-driven dealmaking. Our proprietary Deal Reasoning Engine transforms a firm’s goldmine of complex documents into strategic insights, empowering global deal teams to negotiate with the full force of their organization’s collective knowledge.

Our platform spans M&A, credit finance, fund formation, and real estate. Every deal a firm runs through Centari makes the next one sharper, giving deal teams a clearer view of the market than anyone on the other side of the table.
Today, Ropes & Gray, Willkie, Fried Frank, Wilson Sonsini, and practices across the AmLaw 25 and Magic Circle rely on Centari. We're backed by GTMfund, Jeremy Kranz (former DoorDash board), Andy Appelbaum (Seamless), Jack Altman, South Park Commons, and Recall Capital.

We are drawn to complexity because that is where true innovation happens. If you’re a builder who thrives in ambiguity and operates with radical ownership, we’d love to meet you.

For more information, check out centari.com http://centari.com or find us on LinkedIn https://www.linkedin.com/company/centariapp/.




ABOUT THE ROLE

We are hiring a Senior Software Engineer, Product to join our product team. You'll be a key player in designing and building end to end features, working alongside engineers who share a bias for action. As one team, you'll write code, shape the product, interact with customers, and drive initiatives from concept to completion.

Our systems are built with React/TypeScript and Go on the backend, leveraging cutting-edge LLM technologies across infrastructure, search, and persistence layers. If you're passionate about building impactful LLM applications and thrive on owning complex challenges, we want to hear from you. We expect this engineer to operate equally in the frontend and backend.



This is a primarily remote role. We operate out of Eastern Time.




REQUIREMENTS

 - At least 5+ years of software engineering experience.

 - At least 2+ years of experience building production-ready applications in React.

 - At least 3+ years of experience building production-ready applications in Go or another strongly typed language.

 - Proven ability to work with cutting-edge technology and eagerness to learn new skills.

 - Willingness to roll up sleeves and get things done - our engineers are comfortable switching between different technical domains as needed.

 - Strong collaboration skills and ability to work effectively in a fast-paced environment.

 - Experience as a driving projects end to end.




NICE TO HAVE

 - Experience in enterprise SaaS or with highly regulated industries (e.g., legal, financial services, healthcare).

 - Experience in a startup environment.
   
   


WHAT WE OFFER

 - Build at the frontier of AI for knowledge work, with a highly engaged user base from top firms.

 - Flat organizational structure promoting autonomy and direct impact.

 - Meaningful equity in a high-growth startup.

 - Competitive salary

 - 100% remote. Flexible PTO.

source_jobs.title: Founding Business Development Representative
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT CENTARI

At Centari, we believe that in high-stakes dealmaking, the competitive edge lies within unlocking your firm's private deal data. Centari is building the deal intelligence platform for the future of law and finance, moving beyond simple automation and into a world of data-driven dealmaking. Our proprietary Deal Reasoning Engine transforms a firm’s goldmine of complex documents into strategic insights, empowering global deal teams to negotiate with the full force of their organization’s collective knowledge.

Our platform spans M&A, credit finance, fund formation, and real estate. Every deal a firm runs through Centari makes the next one sharper, giving deal teams a clearer view of the market than anyone on the other side of the table.
Today, Ropes & Gray, Willkie, Fried Frank, Wilson Sonsini, and practices across the AmLaw 25 and Magic Circle rely on Centari. We're backed by GTMfund, Jeremy Kranz (former DoorDash board), Andy Appelbaum (Seamless), Jack Altman, South Park Commons, and Recall Capital.

We are drawn to complexity because that is where true innovation happens. If you’re a builder who thrives in ambiguity and operates with radical ownership, we’d love to meet you.

For more information, check out centari.com http://centari.com or find us on LinkedIn https://www.linkedin.com/company/centariapp/.




ABOUT THE ROLE

We're looking for our first Founding Business Development Representative to accelerate pipeline for Centari's fastest-growing market segments. You'll be on the front lines of our GTM motion: identifying and engaging partners, associates, and practice group leaders at AmLaw 100 firms and senior dealmakers at financial institutions.

This is a high-impact, high-visibility role at a company where outbound motions directly shape company trajectory. You'll work closely with our Strategic Account Executive and GTM leadership to develop targeted outreach strategies, run campaigns, and book meetings that convert. If you're hungry to break into enterprise sales, learn how elite law firms and funds operate, and be part of building something transformative in AI, this is your opportunity.




CORE RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Design and execute multi-channel outbound campaigns across email, LinkedIn, and phone

 - Qualify inbound leads through structured discovery and route opportunities to Account Executives

 - Book qualified meetings that convert to pipeline—success is measured by quality, not just activity

 - Partner with Sales and Marketing to align outreach with campaigns, events, and product launches

 - Maintain accurate CRM records of all activity, notes, and pipeline status in HubSpot

 - Surface prospect feedback, competitive intel, and market insights to sharpen messaging

 - Support events and conferences with pre- and post-engagement to maximize pipeline impact




REQUIREMENTS

 - 1-3 years of experience in a BDR, SDR, or outbound sales role in B2B SaaS, legal tech, fintech, or professional services

 - Excellent written and verbal communication skills

 - Strong organizational skills with ability to manage multiple outreach streams

 - Curiosity and coachability—you learn quickly and apply feedback

 - Resilience and goal orientation—you move fast and don't let "no" slow you down

 - Proficiency with CRM (HubSpot preferred), LinkedIn Sales Navigator, and sales engagement tools




STANDOUT DIFFERENTIATORS

 - Experience in legaltech, fintech, or enterprise solutions for professional services

 - Interest in AI and its applications in professional workflows

 - Experience at an early-stage startup where you had to build your own playbook




WHAT WE OFFER

 - Build at the frontier of AI for knowledge work, with a highly engaged user base from top firms.

 - Competitive salary and equity in a high-growth startup

 - Comprehensive health benefits (Centari covering 100% of employee premiums)

 - Dental and Vision (Centari covering 75% of employee premiums)

 - 401(k) match up to 4%

 - Hybrid work

ABOUT THE ROLE

We're seeking a Strategic Business Development & Growth Lead to partner directly with our CEO and GTM leadership on identifying, evaluating, and executing high-impact growth opportunities. This is a foundational role for someone who thrives on ambiguity, loves diving deep into market analysis, and wants to directly influence the strategic direction of a fast-growing AI company.

You'll be responsible for uncovering new revenue streams and leading cross-functional initiatives that drive sustainable growth. This role requires someone who can seamlessly move between high-level strategic thinking and hands-on execution.

The ideal candidate brings consulting or investment banking rigor to an entrepreneurial environment, combining analytical excellence with creative problem-solving to unlock Centari's next phase of growth.




CORE RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Strategic market analysis & opportunity assessment for new market segments and product opportunities

 - Lead market research initiatives to identify expansion opportunities within legal, financial services, and adjacent markets

 - Develop frameworks for evaluating new business opportunities, including financial modeling and risk assessment

 - Create detailed go-to-market strategies and business cases for leadership review

 - Design and test new pricing models, packaging strategies, and revenue structures

 - Manage timelines, deliverables, and stakeholder communications for complex market entry projects

 - Conduct customer discovery interviews and competitive analysis to validate opportunities

 - Identify and evaluate potential strategic partnerships and channel partnerships




REQUIREMENTS

 - 4-7 years in or selling into private equity, investment banking, or management consulting

 - Early stage startup experience preferred

 - Exceptional analytical skills with expertise in financial modeling, market sizing, and competitive analysis

 - Proven track record of leading strategic initiatives and managing cross-functional projects in fast-paced environments

 - Outstanding communication and presentation skills for investor and C-suite audiences

 - Proven ability to develop and maintain relationships with C-suite level buyer personas

 - Interest in AI/technology with demonstrated ability to quickly develop domain expertise




WHAT WE OFFER

 - Ground-floor opportunity to shape the strategic BD function at a high-growth AI startup, with a highly engaged user base from top firms

 - Competitive salary and equity in a high-growth startup

 - Comprehensive health benefits (Centari covering 100% of employee premiums)

source_jobs.title: Counsel, Applied Legal Research (Singapore)
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT CENTARI

At Centari, we believe that in high-stakes dealmaking, the competitive edge lies within unlocking your firm's private deal data. Centari is building the deal intelligence platform for the future of law and finance, moving beyond simple automation and into a world of data-driven dealmaking. Our proprietary Deal Reasoning Engine transforms a firm’s goldmine of complex documents into strategic insights, empowering global deal teams to negotiate with the full force of their organization’s collective knowledge.

Our platform spans M&A, credit finance, fund formation, and real estate. Every deal a firm runs through Centari makes the next one sharper, giving deal teams a clearer view of the market than anyone on the other side of the table.
Today, Ropes & Gray, Willkie, Fried Frank, Wilson Sonsini, and practices across the AmLaw 25 and Magic Circle rely on Centari. We're backed by GTMfund, Jeremy Kranz (former DoorDash board), Andy Appelbaum (Seamless), Jack Altman, South Park Commons, and Recall Capital.

We are drawn to complexity because that is where true innovation happens. If you’re a builder who thrives in ambiguity and operates with radical ownership, we’d love to meet you.

For more information, check out centari.com http://centari.com or find us on LinkedIn https://www.linkedin.com/company/centariapp/.




ABOUT THE ROLE

We are hiring an experienced transactional attorney to join our Applied Legal Research team. In this role, you will apply your corporate law background to the frontlines of building generative AI applications for the world's leading firms. You will work closely with Centari's Product, Engineering, and Customer Success teams to advance our best-in-class data extraction platform for sophisticated legal work.

This role will be a good fit if you are eager to shape the future of generative AI for legal services through your exceptional problem-solving capabilities, knowledge of transactional law, and bias for action.




WHAT YOU'LL DO

To advance our Deal Intelligence platform, you will:

 - Develop subject-matter expertise to support AI research in transactional law

 - Prompt engineer and fine-tune large language models for legal applications

 - Build proprietary benchmarks to evaluate model performance

 - Tackle unsolved AI problems in document analysis and legal reasoning

 - Contribute to improving our data extraction capabilities




WHAT YOU HAVE

 - LL.B., J.D., or equivalent

 - Singapore qualified lawyer (or other recognized common law jurisdiction) with minimum 3 years PQE.

 - Significant legal experience at a reputable local or international law firm. Experience with debt finance, funds, and complex M&A transactions is a plus.

 - Exceptional technical aptitude. While no coding experience is required, you must have a high level of comfort with learning cutting-edge systems.

 - Proven interest in prompt engineering and leveraging LLMs for legal work.

 - A generalist mindset and adaptability to quickly learn new areas of law.

 - As an independent contractor, the ideal candidate is a proactive, solutions-oriented, and independent self-starter who is comfortable operating with limited supervision in a fast-paced environment.

 - Some collaboration time with US East Coast or West Coast from Monday to Thursday.




WHAT WE OFFER

 - Build at the frontier of AI for knowledge work, with a highly engaged user base from top firms.

 - Hybrid remote/office culture.

 - Flexible PTO.

For more information, check out centari.com http://centari.com or find us on LinkedIn https://www.linkedin.com/company/centariapp/posts/?feedView=all.

source_jobs.title: Enterprise Account Executive
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT CENTARI

At Centari, we believe that in high-stakes dealmaking, the competitive edge lies within unlocking your firm's private deal data. Centari is building the deal intelligence platform for the future of law and finance, moving beyond simple automation and into a world of data-driven dealmaking. Our proprietary Deal Reasoning Engine transforms a firm’s goldmine of complex documents into strategic insights, empowering global deal teams to negotiate with the full force of their organization’s collective knowledge.

Our platform spans M&A, credit finance, fund formation, and real estate. Every deal a firm runs through Centari makes the next one sharper, giving deal teams a clearer view of the market than anyone on the other side of the table.
Today, Ropes & Gray, Willkie, Fried Frank, Wilson Sonsini, and practices across the AmLaw 25 and Magic Circle rely on Centari. We're backed by GTMfund, Jeremy Kranz (former DoorDash board), Andy Appelbaum (Seamless), Jack Altman, South Park Commons, and Recall Capital.

We are drawn to complexity because that is where true innovation happens. If you’re a builder who thrives in ambiguity and operates with radical ownership, we’d love to meet you.

For more information, check out centari.com http://centari.com or find us on LinkedIn https://www.linkedin.com/company/centariapp/.




ABOUT THE ROLE

As an Enterprise Account Executive at Centari, you'll play a key role in architecting & driving our growth strategy. You aren’t afraid to roll up your sleeves and will personally cultivate and execute across the full sales cycle, from outreach to close. This is an early opportunity to join a fast-growing AI company with product-market fit and shape the future of technology for sophisticated dealmakers across law and finance.




CORE RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Revenue Leadership: Drive new business acquisition by prospecting, qualifying, and closing enterprise deals with law firms and financial institutions

 - Enterprise Account Acquisition: Develop and execute account plans to exceed quarterly and annual revenue targets of 6-figure+ ACVs

 - Hands-On Execution: Personally execute on all aspects of the sales process—from cold outreach and email follow-ups to demos and contract negotiations

 - C-Suite Navigation: Build relationships with decision-makers and navigate complex stakeholder environments

 - Cross-Functional Leadership: Partner with product and customer success teams to ensure successful implementations and identify expansion opportunities

 - Compelling Storytelling: Articulate Centari's value proposition through high-impact presentations and demos that translate technical AI capabilities into business value

 - Daily Sales Discipline: Build and maintain your own sales pipeline metrics, activity dashboards, and follow-up systems

 - Market Intelligence: Provide strategic feedback that continues to shape our product roadmap and go-to-market strategies

 - Industry Presence: Represent Centari as a thought leader at industry events and conferences




REQUIREMENTS

 - Exceptional enterprise sales performance with 3-5 years closing complex B2B SaaS deals

 - Proven track record of consistently exceeding quota in environments with long, multi-stakeholder sales cycles

 - Experience prospecting and closing deals with 6-figure+ ACVs

 - Self-starter mentality with the ability to "run through brick walls" to achieve objectives

 - Expertise at the fundamentals of enterprise sales, including outbounds, follow-ups, and managing your own pipeline

 - Experience with modern sales methodologies and CRM platforms (HubSpot expertise preferred)

 - Demonstrated ability to navigate enterprise procurement processes and negotiate complex contracts

 - Track record of building and maintaining relationships with C-suite executives and key decision-makers

 - Bachelor's degree required; MBA or JD a plus

 - Willingness to travel up to 30% of the time

 - Based in NYC




STANDOUT DIFFERENTIATORS

 - Experi

Our systems are built with Go and React/TypeScript, leveraging cutting-edge LLM technologies across infrastructure, search, and persistence layers. If you're passionate about building impactful LLM applications and thrive on owning complex challenges, we want to hear from you.

 - Some experience with or strong interest in LLMs, knowledge graphs, semantic search, and other AI/ML technologies.

 - Proven ability to work with cutting-edge technology and eagerness to learn new skills.

 - Willingness to roll up sleeves and get things done - our engineers are comfortable switching between different technical domains as needed.

NICE TO HAVE

 - Experience in enterprise SaaS or with highly regulated industries (e.g., legal, financial services, healthcare).

 - Experience in a startup environment.

 - Specialized experience and skills in either full-stack product development or data/ML infrastructure.




WHAT WE OFFER

 - Build at the frontier of AI for knowledge work, with a highly engaged user base from top firms.

 - Flat organizational structure promoting autonomy and direct impact.

 - Competitive salary and equity in a high-growth startup

 - Comprehensive health benefits (Centari covering 100% of employee premiums)

 - Dental and Vision (Centari covering 75% of employee premiums)

 - 401(k) match up to 4%

 - Hybrid work culture based in NYC, with lunch covered for in-office days

source_jobs.title: Chief of Staff
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT CENTARI

At Centari, we believe that in high-stakes dealmaking, the competitive edge lies within unlocking your firm's private deal data. Centari is building the deal intelligence platform for the future of law and finance, moving beyond simple automation and into a world of data-driven dealmaking. Our proprietary Deal Reasoning Engine transforms a firm’s goldmine of complex documents into strategic insights, empowering global deal teams to negotiate with the full force of their organization’s collective knowledge.

Our platform spans M&A, credit finance, fund formation, and real estate. Every deal a firm runs through Centari makes the next one sharper, giving deal teams a clearer view of the market than anyone on the other side of the table.


Today, Ropes & Gray, Willkie, Fried Frank, Wilson Sonsini, and practices across the AmLaw 25 and Magic Circle rely on Centari. We're backed by GTMfund, Jeremy Kranz (former DoorDash board), Andy Appelbaum (Seamless), Jack Altman, South Park Commons, and Recall Capital.

We are drawn to complexity because that is where true innovation happens. If you’re a builder who thrives in ambiguity and operates with radical ownership, we’d love to meet you.

For more information, check out centari.com http://centari.com or find us on LinkedIn https://www.linkedin.com/company/centariapp/.




ABOUT THE ROLE

We're hiring our first Chief of Staff to operate as the CEO's primary partner in strategic planning and execution. The role is strategic and operational: owning Centari's operating cadence, KPI infrastructure, and financial planning, and working alongside the CEO on strategic projects like fundraising and partnerships.

You'll work across every function at Centari — Product, Engineering, Account Management, Sales, and Applied Legal Research — driving the initiatives that don't have clean owners and holding leaders to a shared bar. You'll see how the entire company operates and sit close to the decisions that shape its trajectory. The role demands the professionalism and judgment of someone trusted with the full picture: financials, hiring decisions, board dynamics, customer relationships, founder thinking.

Candidates should have experience in investment banking and private equity. Startup experience is a plus. The role is in-office in NYC, full-time.




CORE RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Partner with the CEO on strategy execution: translating priorities into action, owning the highest-impact initiatives end-to-end, and supporting senior hires through close.

 - Own financial planning: burn, runway scenarios, unit economics, and capital allocation.

 - Run the operating cadence (leadership meetings, OKR reviews, weekly all-hands) and the rhythms that hold each function accountable to a shared bar.

 - Build and own the company's KPI dashboard covering revenue, pipeline, product engagement, customer health, hiring, and runway. Use it to trigger accountability conversations across the team.

 - Partner with the CEO on fundraising activities: investor CRM, data room, diligence, scheduling, and follow-ups.

 - Own ongoing investor relations operations between rounds, including reporting cadence and board prep.

 - Drive cross-functional execution on initiatives without a clean owner. Design the cadence, hold the tracker, push function leaders.

 - Manage external resources and vendors (agencies, contractors, fractionals, tooling) with real procurement processes: negotiation, alternatives evaluated, contract terms reviewed.


REQUIREMENTS

 - 4+ years in investment banking and/or private equity.

 - Demonstrated record of owning projects end-to-end in ambiguous environments. Specific examples of work you drove from initiation to measurable outcome, where the path wasn't clear at the start.

 - Strong financial fluency: comfortable building and stress-testing models, engaging substantively on burn, runway, unit economics, and capital allocation.

 - Strong written communication for executive-level audie
